---
title: ""
image: misc/info/photo_megha.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: mpatnaik@luiss.it
      href: mailto:mpatnaik@luiss.it
    - icon: twitter  
      text: megonomista 
      href: https://twitter.com/megonomista
    - icon: linkedin
      text: meghapatnaik
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/megha-patnaik-94769643/
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qh3T6NcAAAAJ
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Welcome! 

I am an Assistant Professor (tenure track) at the Department of Economics and Finance, LUISS Guido Carli in Rome, and a research affiliate at CEPR and at CESifo. I received my Ph.D. in Economics from Stanford University. I am cofounder at [Leap Insights](https://leap-insights.org/), where I head the India Productivity Lab. I am also the Co-Founder of [AccioPix](https://acciopix.com/), an innovative platform that enables event photo sharing using AI-powered face recognition. 

 [Full CV](misc/info/CV_patnaik.pdf).







:::
